photos.map-flatlay: A worn paper map, camera and travel journal laid out on a table
photos.world-map-pen: A hand tracing a route across an unfolded world map
photos.map-topdown: Looking down on a spread-out map as a finger points the way
photos.airport-silhouette: A traveler silhouetted at an airport window as a plane departs
photos.mountain-haze: Late light breaking over a hazy mountain ridge
photos.waterfall-hiker: A lone hiker standing before a roaring forest waterfall
photos.ridge-cairn: A hiker pausing at a stone cairn high on a mountain ridge
photos.desk-globe: A vintage desk globe turned toward Europe and Africa
photos.lake-backpacker: A backpacker looking out over a still alpine lake
photos.gate-wait: A traveler waiting at a sunlit airport gate as a plane climbs outside
photos.dock-lake: Someone sitting at the end of a quiet dock facing a mountain lake

404.title: This page took a wrong turn
404.body: The link may be broken, or the page has moved on to its next destination. Let's get you back on the map.

500.title: Something derailed on our end
500.body: An unexpected error stopped this page from loading. Our team has been notified — give it another try in a moment.

403.title: This route is off-limits
403.body: You don't have access to this page. Sign in with the right account, or ask a trip member for an invite link.

503.title: We're tuning up the itinerary
503.body: OpenTrip is briefly down for maintenance. We'll be back on the road shortly — thanks for your patience.

offline.title: You've lost the signal
offline.body: We can't reach OpenTrip right now. Check your connection and try again — your trip is waiting.
